rationale: Introduce both `swap_spec` hypotheses with one `if` so each consequence can be asserted directly under (H1 && H2): `put_spec` collapses both `post*_self_.epmap@` to the same `pre_self_.epmap@.insert(src@, pre_ack_state)` term (added directly and via `=~=` for Map extensionality), the shared `get_spec` match pins both `post*_ack_state` to a single witness yielding full-struct and per-field `CAckState` equality, and `r1 == r2` is trivial on `()`. This lines up the disjoint triggers from the two `swap_spec` instances on a single `Map::insert`, giving z3 every conjunct of `det_cack_state_swap_equal` it needs.
